parameters.query:
SELECT
  COUNT(*)::int AS existing_chunk_count,
  COALESCE(
    jsonb_agg(DISTINCT NULLIF(metadata_json->>'run_id', '')) FILTER (WHERE COALESCE(metadata_json->>'run_id', '') <> ''),
    '[]'::jsonb
  ) AS existing_run_ids
FROM memories
WHERE COALESCE(metadata_json->>'filepath', '') = $1::text
  AND (
    ($2::text <> '' AND COALESCE(metadata_json->>'modified_epoch', '') = $2::text)
    OR ($3::text <> '' AND COALESCE(metadata_json->>'content_hash', '') = $3::text)
  );
